title: Solving High-Dimensional PDEs with Latent Spectral Models
venue: ICML 2023 / Proceedings of Machine Learning Research
abstract: Latent Spectral Models reduce high-dimensional PDE data into compact latent tokens and apply neural spectral blocks to learn multiple basis operators for PDE-governed tasks.
notes: Formal ICML 2023/PMLR 202 paper; pages 37417-37438. File evidence states Proceedings of the 40th ICML and PMLR publication.

title: Transolver: A Fast Transformer Solver for PDEs on General Geometries
venue: ICML 2024 / Proceedings of Machine Learning Research
abstract: Transolver introduces Physics-Attention, slicing discretized meshes into learned physical-state tokens to obtain a fast transformer PDE solver on complex geometries.
notes: Formal ICML 2024/PMLR 235 paper; pages 53681-53705. Strong relevance to irregular geometry and CFD/industrial simulation surrogates.

title: SONets: Sub-operator learning enhanced neural networks for solving parametric partial differential equations
abstract: SONets decompose parametric PDE solution operators into learnable sub-operators, improving modular operator learning for parametric PDEs.
notes: JCP 495, article 112536. Valuable comparator for modular/sub-operator decomposition in AI-for-PDE models.

title: f-PICNN: a physics-informed convolutional neural network for partial differential equations with space-time domain
abstract: f-PICNN combines convolutional architectures with physics-informed residual constraints over space-time domains for PDE solution learning.
notes: JCP 515, article 113284. Relevant to spatiotemporal residual learning and convolutional PDE solvers.

title: Novel DeepONet architecture to predict stresses in elastoplastic structures with variable complex geometries and loads
venue: Computer Methods in Applied Mechanics and Engineering
abstract: A DeepONet variant predicts stress fields in elastoplastic structures under variable complex geometries and loads, demonstrating operator learning for computational mechanics.
notes: CMAME 415, article 116277. Useful for complex-geometry operator-learning design.

title: Multistage physics informed neural network for solving coupled multiphysics problems in material degradation and fluid dynamics
abstract: A staged PINN training strategy progressively increases coupled physics complexity for asphalt aging and lid-driven cavity flow, reducing training time by more than 90% while preserving accuracy against FEM solutions.
notes: Engineering with Computers 41, 3491-3521; published online 2025-06-29. Directly relevant to coupled multiphysics PINN training.

title: Geometry-informed neural operator for large-scale 3D PDEs
abstract: Geometry-informed neural operator combines local graph kernels and global Fourier-style operator learning for large-scale 3D PDEs on complex geometries.
notes: Formal NeurIPS 2023 proceedings entry. Relevant to 3D geometry-aware operator learning for CFD and multiphysics surrogates.

title: Artificial intelligence for partial differential equations in computational mechanics: A review
abstract: A broad review of AI for PDEs in computational mechanics, covering PINNs, Deep Energy Methods, operator learning, PINO, and applications in solid, fluid and biomechanical systems.
notes: Important review candidate, but publisher venue/date/DOI were not confirmed in current run; kept out of formal main append list and flagged for manual confirmation.
